title: Exposure of Sensitive Data due to Lack of Access Controls
description: The absence of information regarding access controls and data classification creates a significant risk of unauthorized access to sensitive data.  If data is not properly classified and access controls are not implemented, attackers could potentially gain access to confidential information, leading to data breaches and compliance violations.
affected_component: All Data Storage Components, Web Application
attack_vector: Exploitation of misconfigured access controls, vulnerabilities in the web application, or direct access to data storage locations.
mitigations: Implement strict access controls based on the principle of least privilege.
Regularly audit access permissions to ensure they are appropriate.
Encrypt sensitive data at rest and in transit.
